title: Lithium Raycast Fix
body:
# Lithium Raycast Fix
A mod to fix Lithium,We added back the original decision logic that was covered in lithium, adding this mod to avoid raycast loading or block generation at world height!There is showcase.
[Bilibili Vedio Showcase](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1eyc9eiEK2)
![Compare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bba9748129b495f47b0578a28fb2c19e876a33c3.png)
# Note:
This bug has been fixed in the latest version of Lithium, this mod only addresses the old version.
if crash,remove it.
